## LibraryData.resolveSubLibraryLoadSpec() function

Resolves a FullLibraryLoadSpec to a LibraryLoadSpec for a specific sub-library.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function resolveSubLibraryLoadSpec(spec: FullLibraryLoadSpec, subLibraryId: SubLibraryId): LibraryLoadSpec;
```
